review_title: Best Project management software for mid-small size company.
description: After evaluating more than 12 project management tools we finally settled for GoodDay as it was the best from easy to use, easy to customize views based on individual's need. Also, for small company pricing is also important and we found that GoodDay pricing is very competitive.
author: Parth D.
pros: Best thing is it provides different type of views for the same project information and it helps a lot in viewing project from different perspective. Goodday is designed by keeping very small but essential features in mind and that makes it very easy to use product. Very fast loading of tasks data, various type of reports are awesome. Task planning by manager on behalf of your team mates is superb feature. Many more excellent things are there compare to other project management tool.
cons: Initially we tried free version and there are many paid features but unfortunately in order to try those paid features they don't have any trial period. It compulsory requires purchase of subscription to even see how are those features.

review_title: One of the best project management tools our there
description: The overall experience with GoodDay has been most pleasant and it has had a lasting effect on the incrreased efficiency when running and tracking projects of many types. Mos of the projects are related to service or business development.
author: Hannes N.
pros: GoodDay is very easy to use despite a sheer amount of functionality, tools and cutomization options. Many of our teams and departments have had great success in implementing GoodDay in their everyday work and processes. Sharing tasks, information, files and keeping eye on resource usage, including work time, is very simple, yet powerful enough for any project management flow.
cons: This is a hard one, so far no major blockers or issues have arisen. The constant, high quality flow of product updates and new features makes it very difficult to want to move away from it.

review_title: Powerful Tool for Workflow Management
description: I’m still learning all the functions, but GoodDay has helped immensely in making my projects progress more efficient and measurable.
author: Ruth D.
pros: It helps manage my projects and tasks. I can assign collaborators for research and collecting data for projects.
cons: It can feel overwhelming at first because of its many features and setup options. The interface isn’t always intuitive, which makes the learning curve a bit steep for new users.

review_title: Easy to use
description: It was okay , colorfully and easy to use
author: Shontel B.
pros: I can say it was dummy proof when finding things with a business across different organizations
cons: The way you have to navigate shared files

review_title: The most powerful yet easy to use project and task management system
description: Great onboarding, very responsive support, always helpful with configuration and customizations, if needed. The teams get started with the system in a matter of hours, it is very intuitive. Also noticed that updates and new features come out very often, with tutorials and quick tours, great software!
author: Olga Z.
pros: The key value is GoodDay's flexibility, easy of use, and visualization of all work - makes daily work extremely organized and transparent, almost on auto-pilot
cons: If I had to pick something, some users have mentioned mobile app could be better, but I do not necessarily agree

review_title: Near-perfect with little rough corners.
author: Alyx B.
pros: The UI is great. No more issues like with our previous software. Thinks work, no lags, you can get stuff done in so much less time. Let's very self-explanatory.
cons: You can't auto-expand subtasks at all, especially not by default.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Overall Choice
description: We strived to find the best solution amongst many other (ofter well-known) products and were surprised with the features and ease of use of GoodDay. We are using it daily as a team and are very satisfied.
author: Eric S.
pros: - Ease of use - Pricing suitable for small-midsize businnesses - Customizable - Time Tracking - Can easily switch views from Gantt to Board or WorkLoad etc...
cons: - Basic search function not very powerful (advanced search works great though) - Cannot send reports by email (Executive Reports or Any) --> There are Reports but all online. And there might be a way to do it, never asked for it.

review_title: Online project management tool, packed with features.
description: I recommend GD to people who need something more robust than the free tools out there, and want something that has a lot of features for a reasonable price.
author: Paul G.
pros: GoodDay has great basic PM tools - Kanban board, Gantt charts, etc. It is flexible in its views, allowing me to bring to the front the features I am using. My company manages multiple projects, and GoodDay has become essential to our work flow. I really like the Action Required feature as different team members need to contribute to the accomplishment of various tasks. I also like the flexibility of designing my own task types to track the different types to things we work on.
cons: Customer support and training have been weak. We have had to figure a lot of things out ourselves, and we find that onboarding new team members is slow because of the learning curve. It only has the most basic help function, and customer service has sometimes been unresponsive.

review_title: Intuitive Solution
description: The system serves me, at the moment, in the distribution of activities and resources. Meets the Flow of care processes. Registration and Service History. And others.
author: Alexandre G.
pros: The product can be adapted to your needs. So, if the process is well implemented, the results will be very positive, in terms of controls and processes in one place. Simulate the process to get the expected result. If you simply register, you may not have the expected results, like any other system.
cons: So far, it serves our process well, and quickly.

review_title: Efficient task planner
description: It has been User-Friendly and has allowed real-time swift task transitions
author: Brittany P.
pros: This software has improved my productivity growth within our company
cons: While i'm working it freezes and seems as if it has crashed
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review of GoodDay
author: Asha V.
pros: GoodDay has numerous likeable features. My favorite being the user interface feature. From the start, it was easy to navigate and use. Even for those who are not technically competent.
cons: GoodDay has some disadvantages. The main one being its tendency to crash and be unresponsive at times. If this happens, then all work is not saved and has to be re-done.

review_title: Helps organize daily tasks and make updates effectively.
description: With the help of GoodDay, we've been able to consolidate and prioritize all tasks, and we've also been able to have all members collaborate in sharing updates.
author: Mahnoor I.
pros: With GoodDay, we have a great feature for organizing to-do lists and preparing workflow charts, and it's good that daily activities, information, and documents are organized in one place. With GoodDay, all team members can participate, as well as follow the daily schedule of tasks and make updates via their own boards. We can also discuss, exchange opinions, and write comments thanks to the powerful communication channels, which help us keep the affairs of the project always under control. GoodDay's automation and scheduling are effective, enabling us to investigate the impact of changes and completion rates on planned closing dates, find expected closing dates, and quickly identify critical activities.
cons: I don't think GoodDay is ideal for complex projects, where can get out of control when dealing with a large number of tasks. At the same time, due to the wide range of communication options it offers, GoodDay is a great solution for tracking projects with a small number of tasks, where the team can focus on daily updates and catch up on all the details effortlessly.

review_title: Best project management product.
description: Im using it for project management, so i can have control over new jobs that i have arrange.
author: Darko P.
pros: It is super easy, in few minutes i have been able to adjust. Workflow is smooth. Nice!
cons: Dont`t make it complicated with milions of different possibility. :-D

review_title: An excellent player in the market. Maybe the best?
description: We finally find the right software for our needs of project planning and tracking
author: Marco B.
pros: It's extremely easy to use, it's got all the functions you need, really a few useless functions so that choosing the right one is fast.
cons: Really a few things. Let's say I don't like the fact that I can't track my time in advance, that in some occasions could be useful.

review_title: a usefull planning tool
description: just at the beginning ...unfortunately it takes time here to to set it up and, organize it and make the most of it
author: MAURO M.
pros: planning and keeping your activities up to date often becomes a job itself. hence the need to be supported by something simple, flexible, fast. among all those taken into account to date GoodDay is the software that most convinced me. gannt view, kanban, my work... projects view... all immediate and quick tools to organize. such as data entry.
cons: one thing I find very useful are the diagrams and the possibility of having them integrated, as an additional view. It could be interesting. Enter data and points from a diagram and then translate them into tags, gannt view, kanban...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very simple to use, and it helps to multi-task, track progress and engage team members
description: I've tried multiple other tools for project management, but GoodDay is the only one that made my work easier starting day 1. I love it because 99% of its interface makes sense. Also, there are tons of features that I don't use - and they don't stand on the way. I only see what I need to see, and it's easy to focus on the right things. Also, the timer sticks to the very bottom of the screen and doesn't irritate me, unlike other timer tools :)
author: Svetlana K.
pros: The timer feature is perfect for tracking time investments for each task during the day. No more manual logging! And the way it sums up work hours in the end of each day, week, month - per person, per task, etc - makes HR reporting so easy! Also, the interface is very intuitive and user-friendly. In just 2 hours you can schedule lots of projects and see all tasks, subtasks and deadlines on a single dashboard. Actually, lots of different dashboards, to track every aspect of project management, and easy switching between them.
cons: The smartphone version is not as perfect as the desktop browser version.

review_title: GoodDay is the best task management and ticketing software out there!
description: I really love it, and its so simple to use. I cant live without GoodDay
author: Ayush A.
pros: The ease of use and smooth and responsive software.
cons: Nothing, I just hope you include timeline as well were I can create a product roadmap with sub-task that will be a game changer.

review_title: Best Collaboration App I have ever used.
description: Rating 4.5 Stars for developing complex applications with creativity & still keeping their simplicity.
author: Vishal K.
pros: It allows me to create & manage projects/tasks at such ease that I have forgotten to maintain my Diary anymore...

review_title: With GoodDay everything is in one place now and everybody is informed about what is going on around.
author: Mikhail A.
pros: 3-in-1 - GoodDay packs three most important management tools: lists/boards for task management, Gantt-chart for planning and calendar for event management. It is surprising that there are not so many project management solutions that have all three. Managers usually workaround this by using a separate software for the missing part which brings unnecessary complexity. Having tasks, timeline and calendar in GoodDay is very convenient. Flexible project structure - being able to structurize projects in folders is a perfect feature for keeping things in order. This allows managers to have their projects neatly packed together unlike other PM software where you could get lost in hundreds of projects stored in a flat list. Modern and very responsive interface - GoodDay interface feels like a breath of fresh air after having experience with monstrous corporate PM software (you know, the one that starts with J). Everything is located in a perfect position, a lot of small things in front-end prevent you from doing something wrong. Loud applause for the UI/UX team! Area-agnostic - in our company we work in multiple areas: electronics, backend, frontend, support, sales, design. With GoodDay we've been able to put all departments in one system thanks to GoodDay not being fixed to single workflow, but providing tools to customize your own. A lot of extras - there a so many nice additional features in GoodDay. Big screens, views, pretty and quite helpful reports.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Versatile Project Management Tool for Teams
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Best in tracking easily all of our project tasks, and their progress, and storing files in one spot. Compared to other tools on the market, it is more accessible for me, which allows a novice user to easily navigate the platform.
cons: No cons as the platform works perfectly fine as of the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best task and project management software (And it's free!)
author: Taher B.
pros: Good Day is extremely easy to use but houses powerful functionality and project/task tracking. It helps me to stay on top of my tasks and being organized.
cons: I didn't find any cons of this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice product
author: Valerio P.
pros: Report & Analitycs section is the best for us. We can do everything clearly and quickly
cons: I don't like the UI - I suggest investing a bit of time to improve this aspect.

review_title: Best project management tool
description: I am a software tester and it makes my job easy to assign issue/work to any user. By using goodday our work eficiency has been improved.
author: Jayant D.
pros: Best ui Easy to understand There is function in which i can task/issue to particular user. Whenever somone assign me work i got the notification which is best feature.
cons: I didnt find any but if there will be any task/project reporting system then i will be good

review_title: Customizable and fun to use
author: Stephanos I.
pros: The software includes a lot of the features that constitute a good project management software, and it is very adaptive. The software is customizable based on the organizational needs
cons: The last of baseline support on the gantt view
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best system i have ever used. (after trying 4 other system each for 1/2 year...)
description: After using several other systems for several years - no doubt - I must say this is the best option. All what you need plus several great more tricks which you will like to use.
author: Radek F.
pros: Once we started using gd more, new ideas/needs came to our mind and WTF we found all of them are in the system. But even more great ideas which MAKES SENSE TO USE are here. Uau.
cons: Mobile app. It has 10% of the desktop app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
